obstacle_groups.label: NW L-wall — vertical left leg, horizontal top leg
NE L-wall — vertical right leg, horizontal top leg
SW L-wall — vertical left leg, horizontal bottom leg
SE L-wall — vertical right leg, horizontal bottom leg
Left mid wall — touches left between gate rows
Right mid wall — touches right near laser
Upper-left flank — near y=4 left gate
Upper-right flank — near y=4 right gate
Lower-left flank — near y=15 left gate
Lower-right flank — near y=15 right gate

gates.note: y=4 left gate — beam must go RIGHT; leftward blocked
y=4 right gate — beam must go LEFT; rightward blocked
y=15 left gate — beam must go RIGHT; leftward blocked
y=15 right gate — beam must go LEFT; rightward blocked
